default_invariant: All live model calls in this workflow must request the highest documented or highest visible provider-specific reasoning effort available. Browser providers must use ranked same-session UI evidence rather than relying on a hard-coded label. Unknown/default effort is not synthesis-eligible for balanced/audit unless a waiver is recorded before the call.

chatgpt_pro_first_plan.selection_rule: Select ChatGPT Pro and the highest visible thinking-effort option. Do not hard-code a browser label as the contract; record the observed label, available-labels hash, selector manifest version, and effort_rank=highest_visible in redacted evidence.

chatgpt_pro_synthesis.selection_rule: Select ChatGPT Pro and the highest visible thinking-effort option. Do not hard-code a browser label as the contract; record the observed label, available-labels hash, selector manifest version, and effort_rank=highest_visible in redacted evidence.

claude_code_opus.selection_rule: Use Claude Code subscription CLI with Opus 4.7 and --effort max or CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL=max. Include ultrathink as a one-off deep-reasoning request, but do not treat ultrathink as a substitute for setting effort=max.

codex_intake.source: OpenAI Codex config docs list model_reasoning_effort and plan_mode_reasoning_effort values including xhigh.

codex_thinking_fast_draft.source: Fast mode may use Codex CLI as exploratory context only; highest effort is still required.

deepseek_v4_pro_reasoning_search.selection_rule: Use official DeepSeek API with thinking enabled and reasoning_effort=max. If tool calls occur, preserve reasoning_content transiently only as needed for DeepSeek's required tool-call replay, then discard raw content and persist at most a hash.

gemini_deep_think.selection_rule: Select Deep Think in the Gemini web UI. If a separate Gemini thinking-level control is exposed, set it to high. Record the observed Deep Think label, thinking-level label if present, available-labels hash, selector manifest version, and rank evidence.

xai_grok_reasoning.selection_rule: For Grok 4.3, official xAI docs list none/low/medium/high; high is the maximum single-model reasoning depth. Do not use xhigh for Grok 4.3. If using grok-4.20-multi-agent, xhigh controls agent count rather than single-model reasoning depth and must be a separately named route.

references: OpenAI Codex config: model_reasoning_effort and plan_mode_reasoning_effort include xhigh.
OpenAI ChatGPT help/release notes: Thinking/Pro model-picker thinking effort controls; browser labels must be observed live rather than hard-coded.
Google Gemini 3 docs: thinking_level high is the maximum supported level for Gemini 3.1 Pro API; Gemini Apps Deep Think is the highest advanced reasoning mode.
Anthropic Claude docs: Opus 4.7 uses adaptive thinking with effort; max is absolute maximum capability, and Claude Code supports ultrathink for one-off deep reasoning.
xAI reasoning docs: Grok 4.3 reasoning_effort values are none/low/medium/high; high is maximum for the single model.
DeepSeek API docs: deepseek-v4-pro supports thinking enabled and reasoning_effort high/max; max is the highest effort.
Browser labels are not stable contracts; evidence must record observed labels and rank.
